log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 30 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 37/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+6=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 17 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 20/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:11+6=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 5/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 4 ══

ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.

══ ROUND 1 ══

--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
